title: nepeta jomdaensis
intro: Nepeta jomdaensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the Jomda catmint. This perennial herb is native to the high-altitude regions of Yunnan Province in China, and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Nepeta jomdaensis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular remedy in traditional Chinese medicine. In herbal preparations, Nepeta jomdaensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
